mission.title: meshery: [CI] Move to latest version of golangci-lint
mission.description: [CI] Move to latest version of golangci-lint. This issue affects 1+ users.

steps.title: Identify meshery troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your meshery deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n meshery -l app.kubernetes.io/name=meshery
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=meshery -n meshery --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review meshery configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant meshery configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n meshery -l app.kubernetes.io/name=meshery
kubectl get configmap -n meshery -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=meshery
```
Move to the latest version of golangci-lint after https://github.com/golangci/golangci-lint-action/issues/535 is fixed. https://github.com/meshery/meshery/pull/5991 rollbacks the version of golangci-lint due to the given bug.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [CI] Move to latest version of golangci-lint
steps.description:
This PR fixes https://github.com/meshery/meshery/issues/5993

For the purpose of this PR is to separate the `golangci-lint` workflow from the existing workflows, so that we can obtain the necessary reports from linting issues immediately, instead of stopping the existing workflow.

There will still need to be another PR to update the linting settings, which I'm currently working on.

See the fix PR for details: linked PR

steps.title: Confirm [CI] Move to latest version of golangci-lint is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=meshery -n meshery --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n meshery --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
This PR fixes https://github.com/meshery/meshery/issues/5993

For the purpose of this PR is to separate the `golangci-lint` workflow from the existing workflows, so that we can obtain the necessary reports from linting issues immediately, instead of stopping the existing workflow.

There will still need to be another PR to update the linting settings, which I'm currently working on.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with meshery installed or the issue environment reproducible.
